title: madhuca hamiltonia
intro: Madhuca hamiltonia, also known as Butter Tree or Mahua, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of India and Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Madhuca hamiltonia include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Madhuca hamiltonia include the extract of its flowers, which can be used in the form of powder, oil, or decoction, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
